creator: stefan.witzel@zvw.uni-goettingen.de
text:
I installed mongodb 3.6.3 in a jail.

allow.sysvipc;
allow.raw_sockets;

jail_a {
    ip4.addr = "10.164.0.35";
    host.hostname = "jail-a.${host.domainname}";
    enforce_statfs = "0";
}


# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for mongodb36-3.6.3
_OPTIONS_READ=mongodb36-3.6.3
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=SASL SSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SASL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SSL

When trying to create the user administrator as described in the mongodb docs I get the following error message:

MongoDB shell version v3.6.3
connecting to: mongodb://10.164.0.35:27017/
MongoDB server version: 3.6.3
Server has startup warnings:
2018-04-19T07:26:30.639+0200 I CONTROL  [initandlisten]
2018-04-19T07:26:30.640+0200 I CONTROL  [initandlisten] ** WARNING: Access control is not enabled for the database.
2018-04-19T07:26:30.640+0200 I CONTROL  [initandlisten] **          Read and write access to data and configuration is unrestricted.
2018-04-19T07:26:30.640+0200 I CONTROL  [initandlisten]
2018-04-19T07:26:30.640+0200 I CONTROL  [initandlisten]
2018-04-19T07:26:30.640+0200 I CONTROL  [initandlisten] ** WARNING: soft rlimits too low. rlimits set to 12200 processes, 235350 files. Number of processes should be at least 117675 : 0.5 times number of files.
> use admin
switched to db admin
> db.createUser( {user:"admin", pwd:"XXXXXXXX", roles: [{role: "userAdminAnyDatabase", db: "admin" }]})
2018-04-19T07:29:37.378+0200 E QUERY    [thread1] Error: error doing query: failed: network error while attempting to run command 'createUser' on host '10.164.0.35:27017'  :
DB.prototype.runCommand@src/mongo/shell/db.js:168:1
DB.prototype.createUser@src/mongo/shell/db.js:1420:19
@(shell):1:1
2018-04-19T07:29:37.381+0200 I NETWORK  [thread1] trying reconnect to 10.164.0.35:27017 (10.164.0.35) failed
2018-04-19T07:29:37.381+0200 W NETWORK  [thread1] Failed to connect to 10.164.0.35:27017, in(checking socket for error after poll), reason: Connection refused

2018-04-19T07:29:37.381+0200 I NETWORK  [thread1] reconnect 10.164.0.35:27017 (10.164.0.35) failed failed

How to repeat: Run the above commands

Running this on the host (no jail) there is no problem.

System:
FreeBSD iapetos.zvw.uni-goettingen.de 11.1-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p9 #2 r332514: Sun Apr 15 23:19:48 CEST 2018     witzel@iapetos.zvw.uni-goettingen.de:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/iapetos-4.x  amd64
